column1: # OTGW-firmware ESP32-S3 partition table — single app (no OTA)
# Layout mirrors the ESP8266 4M2M scheme: a generously sized filesystem so
# nibbling at the firmware budget. To enable proper OTA (two app slots) a
# 4MB flash layout (TASK-867: app grown +0.5 MB for the ArduinoJson v7 footprint):
#   2.375 MB app (ota_0) + 1.5 MB LittleFS (label "spiffs") + 64 KB coredump
#   The web UI assets use ~0.95 MB
column2: so 1.5 MB still leaves ample filesystem room

column1: #   while the firmware (with ArduinoJson + async stack) gets real headroom again.
# Bootloader: 0x0 (ESP32-S3 specific — differs from original ESP32 which uses 0x1000)
